Here's how to configure the app:

1. Set your port to 3000
2. The database is at localhost:5432
3. Connect using postgres://admin:hunter2secret@rds.amazonaws.com:5432/prod
4. Make sure NODE_ENV is set to production

No secrets in this paragraph, just normal documentation text about
how to deploy the application to production.

Also check out https://docs.example.com/setup for more info.
